'''tahuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrobronchoscope|fibrobronchoscope]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrobronchoscope|fibrobronchoscope]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tahuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tæhiwith || tæhiwij || tæhiwish || tæhiwi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tahuhuwuth || tahuhuwuj || tahuhuwush || tahuhuwu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tahuwuth || tahuwuj || tahuwush || tahuwu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tahufwufth || tahufwufj || tahufwufsh || tahufwuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tahuwuthu || tahuwuju || tahuwushu || tahuwuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || tahuwuth || tahuwuj || tahuwush || tahuwu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tahuwuthul || tahuwujul || tahuwushul || tahuwukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tahuwuuthuthu || tahuwuujuju || tahuwuushushu || tahuwuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || tahuwuthun || tahuwujun || tahuwushun || tahuwukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tahuwuthuoro || tahuwujuoro || tahuwushuoro || tahuwukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
